task.title: Post-Deploy Feature Build — Telegram Wizard + Stripe + Agent Templates
task.description: Dashboard v2 foundation is deployed. Now build the missing product features. Pick up after Sight completes QA.
deliverables: Telegram Connection Wizard — step-by-step UI: Create bot via BotFather > Paste token > Verify connection > Live status indicator
Memory Management Panel — view/edit/search across SESSION/WORKSPACE/GLOBAL scopes with timeline view
Agent Log Viewer — real-time stdout/stderr stream with search, connected via WebSocket
Stripe Billing Integration — checkout flow, subscription management, usage metering dashboard
Agent Templates Marketplace — curated presets (Customer Support, Research Assistant, Code Reviewer)

context.designTokens: All new components MUST use CSS custom properties (--surface-*, --text-*, --accent, etc.) from index.css. NO hardcoded hex colors.
context.routing: Add new routes in main.tsx, wrap in AppShell Outlet pattern. See DashboardPage.tsx for reference.
context.priority: Telegram Wizard first (signature feature), then Memory Panel, then Stripe
